mapper.select: SELECT cityid, name FROM city ORDER BY name
SELECT regionid, name FROM hub_region ORDER BY regionid
SELECT goodsid, name, declared_price FROM goods ORDER BY name
SELECT whid, name FROM warehouse ORDER BY name

SELECT w.*, c.name AS destination_city, r.name AS destination_region FROM waybill w JOIN city c ON c.cityid = w.destination_cityid JOIN hub_region r ON r.regionid = c.regionid WHERE w.waybillid = #{waybillId}

SELECT i.*, g.name AS goods_name, wh.name AS warehouse_name FROM waybill_item i JOIN goods g ON g.goodsid = i.goodsid JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.whid = i.whid WHERE i.waybillid = #{waybillId} ORDER BY i.itemid
SELECT priority FROM waybill WHERE waybillid = #{waybillId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM waybill_item WHERE waybillid = #{waybillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waybill(status, total_freight, create_date, priority, clerk, destination_cityid, remark) VALUES('待发运', 0, #{createDate}, #{priority}, #{clerk}, #{destinationCityId}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT declared_price FROM goods WHERE goodsid = #{goodsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waybill_item(waybillid, goodsid, whid, quantity, base_freight, premium_rate, tax, line_freight) VALUES(#{waybillId}, #{goodsId}, #{whId}, #{quantity}, #{baseFreight}, #{premiumRate}, #{tax}, #{lineFreight})
INSERT INTO stock_txn(whid, goodsid, waybillid, change_quantity, txn_type, operator_name, remark) VALUES(#{whId}, #{goodsId}, #{waybillId}, #{changeQuantity}, #{txnType}, #{operatorName}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE waybill SET total_freight = #{totalFreight} WHERE waybillid = #{waybillId}

UPDATE waybill_item i JOIN goods g ON g.goodsid = i.goodsid SET i.base_freight = ROUND(g.declared_price * i.quantity * 0.08, 2), i.premium_rate = #{premiumRate}, i.tax = #{tax}, i.line_freight = ROUND( (g.declared_price * i.quantity * 0.08) + (g.declared_price * i.quantity * 0.08 * #{premiumRate}) + (g.declared_price * i.quantity * #{tax}), 2 ) WHERE i.waybillid = #{waybillId}
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM waybill WHERE waybillid = #{waybillId}
mapper.update: UPDATE waybill SET status = #{status} WHERE waybillid = #{waybillId}
